title: Vestige - AI Diff Review - Visual Studio Marketplace
excerpt: Extension for Visual Studio Code - Feature-level code visualization for LLM-assisted review: call graphs and file dependency graphs, inside VS Code.
content_html:
Understand this change and what it will break, so you can push it with confidence.

Vestige makes AI-generated diffs reviewable before they're pushed. When an LLM changes a lot of code at once, Vestige answers three questions fast:

  1. Where do I start? — entry points and a guided reading order for the change.
  2. What could this affect? — the blast radius: everything the change can reach or break.
  3. What did this code do before? — the surrounding context, without re-deriving it.

How a review works

  1. Open a folder. Vestige scans and parses it locally — no LLM calls — to build a call graph and a file-dependency graph.
  2. Read the graphs. Click the Vestige icon in the activity bar, or run Vestige: Open Graph, for two tabs on one panel: Repo Graph (function calls) and Feature (feature clusters). Click any node to jump to that code.
  3. Get notified when something changes outside your own typing — an AI agent, a git pull, a bulk edit. Vestige detects it and offers to open the Splash Zone, or opens it automatically if you've turned on vestige.splashZone.autoOpen.
  4. Review in the Splash Zone. The change is broken into an ordered set of review cards, each with its own blast radius, an inline or split diff, an LLM-generated one-line summary, an Explain action for deeper context, and accept/revert controls.

New to Vestige? Run Vestige: Getting Started for a five-step walkthrough (map your project, read the graphs, review a change, judge the blast radius, explain & decide) that links straight to the relevant commands.

Design principles

  • Impact analysis is computed, not guessed. Blast radius comes from the parsed call/dependency graph — deterministic and local, never an LLM hallucinating what a change touches.
  • The LLM only labels and summarizes. Snippet explanations, change-review summaries, and feature-cluster names are generated text on top of the analysis; they never decide what's affected.
  • Analyses are cached. Re-opening a graph or a review doesn't re-run or re-bill work that's already been done.

Data & privacy

Call-graph, dependency-graph, and blast-radius analysis run 100% locally — nothing about your code's structure leaves your machine for these.

Two features send code to the Vestige backend (hosted on AWS, which calls OpenAI to generate text):

  • Explain Selection sends the selected code snippet.
  • Change-review summaries (the one-line summaries on Splash Zone cards) send the changed-code snippets for that chunk.

Feature-cluster analysis sends pre-computed summaries of your code, not raw source.

Nothing is sent unless you use one of these features. There is no telemetry and no analytics.

First-launch limitations

  • TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, Go, and Java are supported. The parsers ship with the extension (tree-sitter compiled to WebAssembly), so nothing to install — open a folder in any of these languages and the graphs, blast radius, and reviews work the same. Other file types are treated as plain dependency-graph nodes.
  • Single-root workspaces only. Vestige scans the first folder in your workspace.
  • Re-parsing on file change isn't incremental at the AST level yet. Fine for small/medium repos; large monorepos will feel the rescan.
  • Feature View's feature map is a whole-repo analysis, generated on demand and cached, not something that updates live.
  • This is a first release. Expect rough edges, and remember the blast radius is only as good as the static call graph — dynamic dispatch and reflection can escape it.

Commands

Command Description
Vestige: Open Graph Open the graph panel (last-used tab).
Vestige: New Graph Tab Open an additional graph panel tab.
Vestige: Show Repo Graph Open the call-graph tab.
Vestige: Show Feature View Open the feature-cluster tab.
Vestige: Explain Selection Explain the selected code (sends the snippet to the backend).
Vestige: Open Splash Zone Open the external-change review panel.
Vestige: Rescan Workspace Force a fresh local scan/parse.
Vestige: Clear Cache Clear cached analysis/explanations.
Vestige: Getting Started Open the walkthrough.

v0.1.0 — first public launch.

blocks.html_en: • Impact analysis is computed, not guessed. Blast radius comes from the parsed call/dependency graph — deterministic and local, never an LLM hallucinating what a change touches.

sentences.en: Impact analysis is computed, not guessed.

sentences.en: Blast radius comes from the parsed call/dependency graph — deterministic and local, never an LLM hallucinating what a change touches.

blocks.html_en: • The LLM only labels and summarizes. Snippet explanations, change-review summaries, and feature-cluster names are generated text on top of the analysis; they never decide what's affected.

sentences.en: The LLM only labels and summarizes.

sentences.en: Snippet explanations, change-review summaries, and feature-cluster names are generated text on top of the analysis; they never decide what's affected.

blocks.html_en: • Analyses are cached. Re-opening a graph or a review doesn't re-run or re-bill work that's already been done.

sentences.en: Analyses are cached.
sentences.zh: 分析结果被缓存。

sentences.en: Re-opening a graph or a review doesn't re-run or re-bill work that's already been done.
sentences.zh: 重新打开图表或审核不会重新运行或重新计费已完成的工作。

sentences.zh: 更改审核摘要（Splash Zone 卡上的一行摘要）发送该块的更改代码片段。

blocks.html_en: Feature-cluster analysis sends pre-computed summaries of your code, not raw source.

sentences.en: Feature-cluster analysis sends pre-computed summaries of your code, not raw source.
sentences.zh: 功能集群分析发送代码的预先计算摘要，而不是原始源代码。

sentences.en: There is no telemetry and no analytics.

blocks.html_en: • TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, Go, and Java are supported. The parsers ship with the extension (tree-sitter compiled to WebAssembly), so nothing to install — open a folder in any of these languages and the graphs, blast radius, and reviews work the same. Other file types are treated as plain dependency-graph nodes.

sentences.en: The parsers ship with the extension (tree-sitter compiled to WebAssembly), so nothing to install — open a folder in any of these languages and the graphs, blast radius, and reviews work the same.
sentences.zh: 解析器附带了扩展（tree-sitter 编译为 WebAssembly），因此无需安装任何内容 - 用任何这些语言打开文件夹，图形、爆炸半径和评论的工作方式都是相同的。

sentences.en: Other file types are treated as plain dependency-graph nodes.
sentences.zh: 其他文件类型被视为普通依赖图节点。

blocks.html_en: • Single-root workspaces only. Vestige scans the first folder in your workspace.

sentences.en: Single-root workspaces only.

blocks.html_en: • Re-parsing on file change isn't incremental at the AST level yet. Fine for small/medium repos; large monorepos will feel the rescan.

sentences.en: Re-parsing on file change isn't incremental at the AST level yet.
sentences.zh: 文件更改的重新解析在 AST 级别还不是增量的。

sentences.en: Fine for small/medium repos; large monorepos will feel the rescan.
sentences.zh: 适合小型/中型回购；大型 monorepos 会感受到重新扫描。

blocks.html_en: • Feature View's feature map is a whole-repo analysis, generated on demand and cached, not something that updates live.

sentences.en: Feature View's feature map is a whole-repo analysis, generated on demand and cached, not something that updates live.
sentences.zh: 功能视图的功能图是整个存储库分析，按需生成并缓存，而不是实时更新。

blocks.html_en: • This is a first release. Expect rough edges, and remember the blast radius is only as good as the static call graph — dynamic dispatch and reflection can escape it.

sentences.en: This is a first release.
sentences.zh: 这是第一个版本。

sentences.en: Expect rough edges, and remember the blast radius is only as good as the static call graph — dynamic dispatch and reflection can escape it.
sentences.zh: 预计会有粗糙的边缘，并记住爆炸半径仅与静态调用图一样好——动态调度和反射可以逃脱它。

content_html_zh:
了解此更改以及它将破坏什么，以便您可以充满信心地推动它。

Vestige 使得人工智能生成的差异在推送之前可以进行审查。 当 LLM 一次更改大量代码时，Vestige 可以快速回答三个问题：

  1. 我从哪里开始？ — 变更的切入点和阅读顺序引导。
  2. 这会影响什么？ — 爆炸半径：变化可以到达或破坏的一切。
  3. 这段代码之前做了什么？ ——周围的环境，无需重新推导它。

评论如何运作

  1. 打开一个文件夹。 Vestige 在本地扫描并解析它（没有 LLM 调用）以构建调用图和文件依赖关系图。
  2. 阅读图表。 单击活动栏中的 Vestige 图标，或运行 Vestige: Open Graph，在一个面板上显示两个选项卡：Repo Graph（函数调用）和 Feature（功能集群）。 单击任意节点即可跳转到该代码。
  3. 当您自己输入的内容发生变化时（AI 代理、git pull、批量编辑），您会收到通知。 Vestige 会检测到它并提供打开 Splash Zone 的功能，或者如果您打开了estige.splashZone.autoOpen，则自动打开它。
  4. 在飞溅区回顾。 变更被分解为一组有序的审查卡，每张都有自己的爆炸半径、内联或分割差异、LLM 生成的单行摘要、更深层次上下文的解释操作以及接受/恢复控件。

遗迹新手？ 运行 Vestige：入门，进行五步演练（绘制项目、阅读图表、检查更改、判断爆炸半径、解释和决定），直接链接到相关命令。

设计原则

  • 影响分析是计算出来的，而不是猜测的。 爆炸半径来自解析的调用/依赖关系图——确定性和局部性，从来没有法学硕士对变化所涉及的内容产生幻觉。
  • LLM只做标签和总结。 片段解释、变更审核摘要和功能集群名称是在分析之上生成的文本；他们从不决定什么会受到影响。
  • 分析结果被缓存。 重新打开图表或审核不会重新运行或重新计费已完成的工作。

数据和隐私

调用图、依赖图和爆炸半径分析 100% 在本地运行 - 代码结构中的任何内容都不会离开您的机器。

有两个功能将代码发送到 Vestige 后端（托管在 AWS 上，调用 OpenAI 生成文本）：

  • 解释选择发送选定的代码片段。
  • 更改审核摘要（Splash Zone 卡上的一行摘要）发送该块的更改代码片段。

功能集群分析发送代码的预先计算摘要，而不是原始源代码。

除非您使用这些功能之一，否则不会发送任何内容。 没有遥测，也没有分析。

首次启动限制

  • 支持 TypeScript/JavaScript、Python、Go 和 Java。 解析器附带了扩展（tree-sitter 编译为 WebAssembly），因此无需安装任何内容 - 用任何这些语言打开文件夹，图形、爆炸半径和评论的工作方式都是相同的。 其他文件类型被视为普通依赖图节点。
  • 仅限单根工作区。 Vestige 扫描工作区中的第一个文件夹。
  • 文件更改的重新解析在 AST 级别还不是增量的。 适合小型/中型回购；大型 monorepos 会感受到重新扫描。
  • 功能视图的功能图是整个存储库分析，按需生成并缓存，而不是实时更新。
  • 这是第一个版本。 预计会有粗糙的边缘，并记住爆炸半径仅与静态调用图一样好——动态调度和反射可以逃脱它。

命令

命令 描述
遗迹：开放图谱 打开图形面板（上次使用的选项卡）。
Vestige：新图表选项卡 打开附加图形面板选项卡。
Vestige：显示回购图 打开调用图选项卡。
Vestige：显示功能视图 打开功能集群选项卡。
Vestige：解释选择 解释所选代码（将片段发送到后端）。
遗迹：开放的飞溅区 打开外部更改审核面板。
Vestige：重新扫描工作区 强制进行新的本地扫描/解析。
痕迹：清除缓存 清除缓存的分析/解释。
遗迹：入门 打开演练。

v0.1.0 — 首次公开发布。
